desc_da: International registreringsorganisation for yogalærere (RYT) og yogaskoler (RYS). Standarden for 200- og 500-timers certificeringer.
desc_en: International registry for yoga teachers (RYT) and yoga schools (RYS). The standard for 200- and 500-hour certifications.

desc_da: Grundlæggende yogalærercertificering efter gennemført 200-timers uddannelse ved en registreret skole.
desc_en: Foundational yoga teacher certification after completing a 200-hour training at a registered school.

desc_da: Avanceret yogalærercertificering. Kræver 200+300 timers uddannelse og yderligere undervisningserfaring.
desc_en: Advanced yoga teacher certification. Requires 200+300 hours of training and additional teaching experience.

desc_da: Erfaren yogalærer der opfylder krav om undervisningstimer efter certificering. Kan lede læreruddannelser.
desc_en: Experienced yoga teacher meeting requirements for teaching hours after certification. Can lead teacher trainings.

desc_da: Struktureret uddannelsesprogram til at certificere yogalærere. Typisk 200 eller 500 timer med teori og praksis.
desc_en: Structured training program to certify yoga teachers. Typically 200 or 500 hours of theory and practice.

desc_da: Point for løbende faglig udvikling krævet af Yoga Alliance for at opretholde registrering.
desc_en: Points for ongoing professional development required by Yoga Alliance to maintain registration.

desc_da: Traditionelt sanskritord for et sted til yoga-praksis. Bruges i dag om yogastudier og øvelokaler.
desc_en: Traditional Sanskrit word for a place of yoga practice. Used today for yoga studios and practice spaces.
